bids.reasoning: At t=0.00 there is no time pressure to concede, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid. The opponent’s only offer is all valueE, which gives me low utility and does not yet show any concession pattern, so I will open with my top values on all issues.

At t=0.02 it is still very early, so I am targeting a near-maximum utility bid while avoiding an exact repeat of my prior offer. The opponent’s second offer is actually slightly worse for me than their first, so there is no evidence of concession yet; I will make only a minimal concession on a low-weight issue.

At t=0.04 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making only a small concession to avoid repeating my prior offer. The opponent has moved toward my preference on issueC but is still offering poor values on issueA and issueB, so I will hold firm on those high-importance issues and concede only the low-weight issueE.

The opponent’s offers have improved for me from about 0.25 to about 0.40 utility, mainly by moving issueC to my best value and issueB slightly upward, so they are conceding but still far from my prior bids. Since it is very early at t=0.06, I will keep my high-weight issues A, B, and C at my preferred values while making a concession on low-weight issueD, which their offers consistently signal they may value.

At t=0.08 it is still very early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while making a modest new concession to avoid simply repeating my prior offer. The opponent’s offers have improved for me on issueC and issueB, but they keep signaling valueE/issueD-style positions on issueD and issueE, so I concede on the lower-weight issueE while holding firm on my highest-value issues.

At t=0.10 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid while showing movement on lower-weight issues. The opponent’s offers have improved for me over time, especially on issueC and issueA, so I will hold firm on my most important/value-rich issues while conceding issueD and issueE, which cost me less.

I am targeting a solid but more acceptable utility around 0.69, since it is still early at t=0.12 but the opponent has clearly moved toward my priorities on issueA and issueC. Their latest offer is already much better for me than their opening, and they previously showed willingness on issueB=valueB, so I am holding my highest-weight wins while conceding low-weight issueD and issueE.

At t=0.14 it is still early, so I am targeting a high-utility bid around 0.76 while making concessions on lower-weight issues D and E. The opponent has clearly moved toward my priorities on issueA and issueC, but their latest offer regressed on issueB, so I will hold firm there rather than accept the weaker valueE.

I am targeting a strong but not maximal utility because it is still early (t=0.16), while recognizing that the opponent has conceded substantially on issueA and issueC and most recently accepted issueB: valueB. Their offers suggest they care about keeping issueD and issueE low for me, so I concede there while holding firm on my most important issues.
